# Ask Combination Audit

**Review basis only.** This report is generated for Philipp/Cowork curation review; it is not a frontend data source.

- Command: `npm run audit:ask-combinations`
- Question source: `src/lib/ask/questions.ts`
- Recommender: `src/lib/ask/recommend.ts`
- Combinations: 1080
- Recommendation limit per combination: Top-10
- Weak-score threshold: top score < 35
- Markdown: `C:\Users\Phil\chrono-lexicanum-batches\ingest\ask\audit-ask-combinations.md`
- JSON detail: `C:\Users\Phil\chrono-lexicanum-batches\ingest\ask\audit-ask-combinations.json`

## Curation reference frame

- FanFiAddict beginner guide: https://fanfiaddict.com/so-you-want-to-start-reading-warhammer-40000-heres-where-to-start/
- WH40K Book Club beginner guide: https://wh40kbookclub.com/beginners-guide-to-warhammer-40000/
- Expected anchors for review: Eisenhorn/Bloodlines/Vaults of Terra, Gaunt/Cain/Cadia, Uriel Ventris/Brothers of the Snake, Night Lords/Talons/Iron Warriors, The Infinite and the Divine, and explicit-but-not-random Horus Heresy visibility.

## Score summary

- Empty combinations: 0
- Weak combinations: 0
- Top-score min / p10 / median / p90 / max: 90 / 110 / 140 / 182 / 260
- Heresy exposure: explicit Heresy combos 0.0% (0/2700 Top-10 slots); non-Heresy newcomer combos 0.0% (0/2700 slots).
